Video.summary: Strollers enjoy a wooded scenario.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Morning Walk

Video.summary: Evergreens surround cool, still water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Nature's Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry scene on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Seclusion

Video.summary: Bob's landscape fades into infinity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Half Oval Vignette

Video.summary: Bob uses rich colors for a nostalgic mill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Old Country Mill

Video.summary: Bob paints the northern lights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Northern Lights

Video.summary: Gold, lavender and crimson surround a quiet brook.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Crimson Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a twilight scene in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Toward Day's End

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry vignette.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frozen Beauty in Vignette

Video.summary: Steve Ross paints hills, trees and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake View

Video.summary: Brilliant foliage surrounds a quiet pond.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Absolutely Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a chilly morning scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: At Dawn's Light

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Fisherman's Paradise

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a storm's onset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Just Before the Storm

Video.summary: Bob paints an idyllic scene within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Bliss

Video.summary: A playful brook complements a range of rugged mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Mountain Brook

Video.summary: Dana Jester paints a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Beauty

Video.summary: Bob paints large and small falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Falls in the Glen

Video.summary: Bob paints flowering trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Trace of Spring

Video.summary: A wilderness path leads to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob accents with an abundance of trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterside Way

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross uses a lot of color in a depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow-tipped valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: First Snow

Video.summary: Bob's use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to a woodside setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hunter's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Bob paints trees overlooking gentle waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: River's Peace

Video.summary: Bob paints the desert in spring.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Hues

Video.summary: Bob paints a wilderness home.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Delightful Meadow Home

Video.summary: Bob paints a fence beside a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: The Property Line

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: An Arctic Winter Day

Video.summary: Bob highlights a snowy scene with blue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lonely Retreat

Video.summary: Bob paints a foggy river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: In the Stillness of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a crimson shoreline.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Crimson Tide

Video.summary: Bob paints a hidden lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake in the Valley

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Bob paints greenery and small falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley Waterfall

Video.summary: Bob Ross demonstrates the painting of a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Towering Peaks

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a woodland scene complete with a small footbridge running across a creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Bridge

Video.summary: Bob Ross paints a forest landscape, featuring a stream, rock formations and trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twin Falls

Video.title: Ocean Breeze
